title: Appendix #A-9 ORS Cheque on Deposit Search Results Grid
body_text:
Appendix #A-9	ORS Cheque on Deposit Search Results Grid
Column Name
Column Description
Format
A
Action
P ГўВЂВ“ Print image of item
T ГўВЂВ“ View transactions (deposit slip and other cheques) associated with cheque
V
View
Checkbox
Transit
Route and Transit Number of deposit slip
Example: 12340809
Date
Date deposit is credited to financial institution account at Central 1
Mmm dd yyyy, Example: Jan 05 2005
Cheque #
Serial # of cheque
1ГўВЂВ“12 digits
Cheque Transit #
Route and Transit Number of cheque
Example: 12340002
Account
MICR account number encoded on cheque
1ГўВЂВ“14 digits
Amount
Dollar amount of cheque
1ГўВЂВ“8 digit dollar amount + ГўВЂВњ.ГўВЂВќ + 2 digit cents
Currency
Currency
CAD ГўВЂВ“ Canadian Dollar
USD ГўВЂВ“ US Dollar
XXX ГўВЂВ“ Foreign currency
Trace #
10 digit item trace number
TranCode
Transaction Code
See
Appendix #A-10
, ORS Transaction Codes
